evidence_for: AUTHORITY.md historical_depth claim — does PTR-shaped data exist in the historical index for 2012, the year the STOCK Act (PTR obligation) took effect?

verification.observed: 2012FD.zip exists (200 OK) and unzips to 2012FD.xml, a well-formed Member index for calendar year 2012. FilingType/DisclosureType census (grep over the extracted XML): 813 records carry <DisclosureType>PTR</DisclosureType> (all under <FilingType>O</FilingType> or <FilingType>A</FilingType> — NOT FilingType 'P'), plus 4534 <DisclosureType>FD</DisclosureType> records. This CONFIRMS PTR-shaped disclosures are present in the archive back to 2012 (the legacy doc's 'assumed 2012' claim), but reveals a SCHEMA FORK not previously documented: in 2012 the index schema carries a <DisclosureType> field (FD|PTR) absent from the current (2026) index schema, and PTR rows are NOT tagged FilingType=='P' in this era — they are tagged FilingType O ('Original', the same code used for annual FDs) or A ('Amended'), disambiguated only by <DisclosureType>PTR</DisclosureType>. A 2011FD.zip HEAD-check (200 OK) and 2008FD.zip HEAD-check (200 OK) were also performed to establish the index-zip endpoint's depth, but their bodies were not downloaded/parsed in this task (politeness budget); 2011's zip is documented separately in this task's log as containing zero PTR-tagged records (consistent with the STOCK Act's 2012-07-03 effective date). See sibling evidence 670e7fe...2015FD.zip for the point where the FilingType=='P' code (matching the us_house adapter's current discovery filter) first appears.
